content:
吴侬软语挠心脾，轻罗小扇掩笑吟。
郎情妾意曲终尽，屠戮礼祭唤神女。
朱门内眷无人忆，化作枯骨悲了去。

宅深巷远，连梦都飞不出去；凄凄哀嚎，在扇与镰中消弭。
“老爷…郎君…好痛、好痛……”
滋养吧——生长吧——从欲望里从痴妄中——
“…嘻嘻…郎君呀，给妾身一个吻可好？”
——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——
Soft whispers tease the restless heart and soul;
A silken fan half-hides her rosy glow.
Lovers' passion ends as the music fades;
Yielding to crimson rite and sharpened blades.
Their names no living soul can now recall;
Their bones now bleach where moonlight fears to fall.

Deep manors, distant alleys... even dreams cannot fly free.
Piteous wails are smothered, silenced between the fan and the scythe.

"Master... darling... it hurts... I'm hurting so, so much..."
Feed on this. Grow—sprout from the filth of desire, from the marrow of madness—
"...Hehe... Oh, darling, won't you give us a kiss?"
thread_title: V2.4.2 深宅旧梦┊V2.4.2 Dream in Secluded Manor
